description: Perform an interaction in an open Locus View host window. Use `view_snapshot` first to get element ids, selectors, text, roles, or screen coordinates.

viewId.description: View id of the open View host window.

action.description: Action name: click, doubleClick, hover, focus, type, press, setValue, selectOption, check, uncheck, scroll, or drag.

target.description: Target locator. Supported fields: elementId, selector, text, name, role, x, y.

key.description: Keyboard key for press, for example Enter, Escape, Tab, ArrowDown.

to.description: Destination locator for drag. Supported fields match target.
